title: Phase 007 — Memory Backend Semantic Trigger Matching (Hybrid)
description: Phase 007 — ADAPT XCE-style semantic similarity into memory_match_triggers as a hybrid lexical+semantic stage. Lexical remains primary precision path; semantic adds paraphrase recall as feature-flagged UNION fallback using existing Voyage-4 cache. Cognitive activation guards (semantic-only at reduced attention) prevent control-surface masquerading. Default-off behind SPECKIT_SEMANTIC_TRIGGERS. Schema migration: new memory_trigger_embeddings table; backfill via memory_index_scan + save-time pipeline. ~280-430 prod LOC + ~180-280 tests.
